name: Frisco Large Size Dog Poop Bags, 120 count
description: If standard-size bags just aren’t cutting it for your dog’s business, these durable, heavy-duty Frisco by Chewy bags can get the job done! These sturdy bags measure 11.5x17 inches, with an ultra-capacity design that’s sure to pick up whatever your pup is putting down with ease. And with the extra-thick, leak-proof plastic, you can rest assured that those doggie messes will stay right where they belong—in the bag. Plus, with the 120-bag pantry pack, you’ll always have a bag on hand when nature calls. Just pull out and tear a few bags off before heading out the door.
